description: A logistics coordinator must monitor a shipment of temperature-sensitive vaccines to ensure it remains within the required temperature range.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details for a specific vaccine shipment, including its route and temperature requirements (2-8°C).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the shipment and its required temperature range.

nodes.task_description: Access the real-time data from the temperature logger attached to the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully connects to the IoT sensor data stream.

nodes.task_description: Detect a temperature excursion alert indicating the temperature has risen to 9.5°C.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the alert and the deviation details.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a quality investigation and notify the recipient to quarantine the shipment upon arrival.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a quality event and sends a notification to the destination site.
